narrative:
Tiffin City has 10,260 registered voters, with 59.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.2 percentage points.
